deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.title: DeepSeek V4 for Copilot Chat
deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up DeepSeek V4 models in Copilot Chat.
deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.d:
[Get an API key](command:deepseek-copilot.getApiKey) from deepseek.com.
[Set API Key](command:deepseek-copilot.setApiKey)
If the models are hidden, open VS Code's Language Models manager and show the DeepSeek models.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
deepseek-copilot.config.title: DeepSeek Copilot
deepseek-copilot.config.baseUrl.descript: DeepSeek API base URL. Defaults to official DeepSeek API endpoint.
deepseek-copilot.config.maxTokens.descri: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to 0 to use the API default (no limit). Useful for controlling costs.
deepseek-copilot.config.debugMode.descri:
Controls what diagnostic information DeepSeek Copilot writes. Token usage is always reported to Copilot regardless of this setting.

- **Minimal** — Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or request dumps.
- **Metadata** — Privacy-safe diagnostic metadata (request hashes, prefix overlap, tool schema changes). Does not contain prompt text — safe to share in public issue reports. View with [`DeepSeek: Show Logs`](command:deepseek-copilot.showLogs).
- **Verbose** — Complete request payloads written to disk for local debugging. **Warning: contains sensitive prompt content.** View with [`DeepSeek: Open Request Dumps Folder`](command:deepseek-copilot.openRequestDumpsFolder).
deepseek-copilot.config.debugMode.minima: Token usage only. No diagnostic logs or dumps.
deepseek-copilot.config.debugMode.metada: Privacy-safe metadata. Safe to share publicly. View with `DeepSeek: Show Logs`.
deepseek-copilot.config.debugMode.verbos: ⚠️ Contains sensitive prompt content. For local debugging only.
deepseek-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides: Override the API model ID sent for each DeepSeek model. Defaults are prefilled with official DeepSeek IDs; change them only when using a compatible third-party API that uses different model names.
API model ID for DeepSeek V4 Flash
API model ID for DeepSeek V4 Pro
deepseek-copilot.config.visionModel.desc: Model ID for vision proxy (describes images for text-only DeepSeek models). Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'DeepSeek: Set Vision Proxy Model' command to pick one from a list.
deepseek-copilot.config.visionPrompt.des: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments before forwarding them to DeepSeek.
